creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

     VERSION_MAJOR
             If supported, expands to the major version of the operating
             system.  (Only supported on FreeBSD )

     VERSION_MINOR
             If supported, expands to the minor version of the operating
             system.  (Only supported on FreeBSD )

https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg.conf&apropos=0&sektion=0&manpath=FreeBSD+14.1-RELEASE+and+Ports&arch=default&format=html (Variables)
